# World History Contract (Generated)

Contract: `WORLD-HISTORY-CONTRACT-001`
Domain: `world-history`
Version: `2026-03-22`

Rules: 6

| Rule ID | Level | Title | Statement |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| R-WHIST-001 | must | canonical-happened-facts | World History stores canonical happened facts only, never arbitrary story traces. |
| R-WHIST-002 | must | explicit-history-append | History append is explicit; story-stop persistence cannot auto-convert runtime output into world history. |
| R-WHIST-003 | must | typed-history-provenance | Each history event carries typed provenance including appId, sessionId, actorRefs, reason, and evidenceRefs. |
| R-WHIST-004 | must | no-shared-history-for-non-canon-runs | Replay and private continuity app runs must not append shared world history; only CANON_MUTATION matrix entries may do so. |
| R-WHIST-005 | must | append-only-history | World History is append-only; correction uses superseding or invalidation records instead of silent deletion. |
| R-WHIST-006 | must | archive-not-history | App-owned narrative archives must not be represented as Realm canonical world history. |

Entities: 1

| Entity | Prisma Model | Required Fields | JSON Fields |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| WorldHistoryEvent | WorldHistoryEvent | id, worldId, appId, sessionId, eventType, title, happenedAt, visibility, schemaId, schemaVersion, reason, committedAt | payload, actorRefs, evidenceRefs, relatedStateRefs, supersedes, invalidates |

Required operations: 2
- GET /api/worlds/{worldId}/history
- POST /api/worlds/{worldId}/history/appends

Secondary operations: 1
- GET /api/worlds/{worldId}/history/{eventId}
